description: Backpack is perfect for storing all of your crafting essentials. Rucksack has 4 large compartments inside. On the outside of the bag there is a large zipped pocket with an organizer panel. Large pocket on the back of the bag. There are pockets on each end of the bag, and 3 reinforced holes on each side of the bag for yarn to go through. Backpack straps are wide, padded, and adjustable so it is comfortable to wear. Durable and waterproof. Made from polyester. Item size: (d/w/h) 28 x 24 x 43cm. Wipe clean only.
